key_quote: No mechanized proof of the T-Fair coherence condition or the preservation theorem despite their centrality to the project's claims; for results of this importance, Isabelle/HOL or Coq formalization is expected.
rationale: The coalgebraic compression for TLA+ model checking is recognized as novel. Blockers are: bounded conformance gap, TLA-lite fragment exclusions, no mechanized proofs, differential testing unavailable at scale, and compression ratio inconsistencies. All technical depth. Category B.
